name: mios_security_audit
description: Structured output for an MiOS host security posture audit.

image_signature_verified.description: Did `cosign verify` against the GitHub Actions OIDC identity succeed?

missing_protections.description: Human-readable list of protections that should be on but aren't (e.g. 'fapolicyd is masked', 'getenforce returned Permissive').

remediation_steps.description: Ordered shell commands or file edits to restore baseline.
